revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24598347618|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Ai-jinja]][[ja:阿為神社]] {{Infobox religious building | name = Ai Shrine | native_name = 阿為神社 | image = Ai-jinja, haiden.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Ai Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.854146|135.563052}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane|lt=Ame-no-Koyane|en|Ame-no-Koyane|fr|Ama-no-Koyane-no-mikoto|it|Ame-no-Koyane|ja|天児屋命|mni|ꯑꯃꯦ-ꯅꯣ-ꯀꯣꯌꯅꯦ|pt|Ame-no-Koyane|ru|Амэ-но коянэ-но микото|simple|Ame-no-Koyane|zh|天兒屋命|qid=Q2564508|1=Ame-no-Koyane}} }} {{nihongo|'''Ai Shrine'''|阿為神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Subshrine|lt=Shikinai Subshrine|qid=Q135100459|1=Shikinai Subshrine}} * {{ill|Kanpei-sha|lt=Kanpei-sha|simple|Kanpei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}} * {{ill|Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver|lt=Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver|qid=Q135009152|1=Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver}} * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Supershrine|lt=Shikinai Supershrine|qid=Q135419779|1=Shikinai Supershrine}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11498550|ltq=Q11498550|qid=Q11498550|1=List of Shikinaisha in Settsu Province}} ** P155: {{ill|Sukukuno Shrine|lt=Sukukuno Shrine|qid=Q135039210|1=Sukukuno Shrine}} ** P155: {{ill|Q11383089|ltq=Q11383089|qid=Q11383089|1=Sawaragi Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Io Shrine|lt=Io Shrine|ja|井於神社|qid=Q11373608|1=Io Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q11570305|ltq=Q11570305|qid=Q11570305|1=Mure Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Ai|lt=Ai|ja|安威村|ko|아이촌 (오사카부)|uk|Ай (Осака)|qid=Q11450514|1=Ai}} * {{ill|Q864163|ltq=Q864163|qid=Q864163|1=Settsu Province}} * {{ill|Shimashimo district|lt=Shimashimo district|ja|島下郡|zh|岛下郡|qid=Q10976940|1=Shimashimo district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.854146|135.563052}} == image (P18) == * Ai-jinja, haiden.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q2564508|ltq=Q2564508|qid=Q2564508|1=Ame-no-Koyane}} * {{ill|Q317997|ltq=Q317997|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} * {{ill|Ukanomitama|qid=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama|de|Ukanomitama|en|Ukanomitama|eo|Ukanomitama|fr|Uka-no-Mitama|ja|ウカノミタマ|mni|ꯎꯀꯅꯣꯃꯤꯇꯃ|ru|Ука-но митама|simple|Ukanomitama|sv|Ukanomitama|th|อูกาโนมิตามะ|zh|宇迦之御魂神|qid=Q3080728|1=Ukanomitama}} * {{ill|Q382005|ltq=Q382005|qid=Q382005|1=Sugawara no Michizane}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181046 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917284|ltq=Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * Мастор|my|ဂျပန်နိုင်ငံ|mzn|جاپون|nap|Giappone|nds_nl|Japan|nds|Japan|ne|जापान|new|जापान|nia|Jepang|nl|Japan|nlnews|Categorie:Japan|nlvoyage|Japan|nn|Japan|nov|Japan|no|Japan|nqo|ߗ߭ߊߔߐ߲߫|nrm|Japon|nr|Japane|nso|Japane|nv|Binááʼádaałtsʼózí Dineʼé Bikéyah|ny|Japan|oc|Japon|olo|Japounii|om|Jaappaan|or|ଜାପାନ|os|Япон|pag|Hapon|pam|Hapon|pap|Hapon|pa|ਜਪਾਨ|pcd|Japon|pcm|Japan|pdc|Japan|pfl|Japan|pl|Japonia|plnews|Kategoria:Japonia|plquote|Japonia|plvoyage|Japonia|pms|Giapon|pnb|جاپان|pnt|Ιαπωνία|ps|جاپان|pt|Japão|ptnews|Categoria:Japão|ptquote|Japão|ptvoyage|Japão|pwn|Dripun|qu|Hapun|rm|Giapun|rmy|Japan|rn|Yapon|roa_rup|Japonia|roa_tara|Giappone|ro|Japonia|ronews|Categorie:Japonia|rovoyage|Japonia|rue|Японія|ru|Япония|runews|Категория:Япония|ruvoyage|Япония|rw|Ubuyapani|sah|Дьоппуон|sat|ᱡᱟᱯᱟᱱ|sa|जपान्|scn|Giappuni|sco|Japan|sc|Giapone|sd|جاپان|se|Jáhpan|sg|Zapöo|shn|မိူင်းၵျႃႇပၢၼ်ႇ|sh|Japan|simple|Japan|si|ජපානය|skr|جاپان|sk|Japonsko|sl|Japonska|smn|Jaapaan|sm|Iapani|sn|Japani|so|Jabaan|sq|Japonia|sqnews|Kategoria:Japoni|srn|Japan|sr|Јапан|srnews|Категорија:Јапан|srquote|Јапан|ss|IJapani|stq|Japan|st|Japane|su|Jepang|sv|Japan|svnews|Kategori:Japan|svvoyage|Japan|sw|Japani|syl|ꠎꠣꠙꠣꠘ|szl|Japůńijo|szy|Zipun|ta|யப்பான்|tanews|பகுப்பு:ஜப்பான்|tay|Gipun|tcy|ಜಪಾನ್|tdd|ᥛᥫᥒᥰ ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * あいじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 5120905000111 == Commons category (P373) == * Ai-jinja == has part(s) (P527) == * {{ill|Mitekurano Shrine|lt=Mitekurano Shrine|qid=Q135098903|1=Mitekurano Shrine}} * {{ill|Q135206826|ltq=Q135206826|qid=Q135206826|1=Mitekurano Shrine former site}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '大阪府茨木市安威3丁目17-17', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Ai-jinja}} [[JA:阿為神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11657591}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name=Ai Shrine |Image=[[File:Ai-jinja, haiden.jpg|250px|]]
Worship hall |Location={{ill|lt=Osaka Prefecture|Q122723|qid=Q122723|1=Osaka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ibaraki City|Q502403|qid=Q502403|1=Ibaraki, Osaka}}{{ill|lt=Awi Village|Q11450514|qid=Q11450514|lt=Awi|1=Ai}} 3-chome 17-17 |Coordinates= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Deities={{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q2564508|lt=Amenokoyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane}}
{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama-no-Kami|1=Ukanomitama}}
{{ill|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|Q382005|qid=Q382005|1=Sugawara no Michizane}} |Shrine rank={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (minor)
Former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |Founded=(traditionally) {{ill|lt=Fujiwara no Kamatari|Q433995|qid=Q433995|1=Fujiwara no Kamatari}} |Main hall= |Festival={{ill|lt=May 3|Q2547|qid=Q2547|1=May 3}}・{{ill|lt=May 4|Q2549|qid=Q2549|lt=4th|1=May 4}} |Map= {{Location map|Japan Osaka|label=Ai Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} [[File:Ai-jinja, torii.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Ai Shrine''' (あいじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|lt=Osaka Prefecture|Q122723|qid=Q122723|1=Osaka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ibaraki City|Q502403|qid=Q502403|1=Ibaraki, Osaka}}{{ill|lt=Awi Village|Q11450514|qid=Q11450514|lt=Awi|1=Ai}}. It is a Shikinaisha listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}, recorded as “{{ill|lt=Settsu Province|Q864163|qid=Q864163|1=Settsu Province}}{{ill|lt=Shimashimo District|Q10976940|qid=Q10976940|1=Shimashimo district}} Ai Shrine, Kuwabuki.” It is also known as Naemori Shrine. === History === According to shrine tradition, it is an ancient shrine said to have been founded by the enshrinement carried out by {{ill|lt=Fujiwara no Kamatari|Q433995|qid=Q433995|1=Fujiwara no Kamatari}}. In the “Settsu Shinbetsu” section of the {{ill|lt=Shinsen Shōjiroku|Q1045362|qid=Q1045362|1=Shinsen Shōjiroku}}, it states: “Nakatomi Aino Muraji, same deity ({{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q2564508|lt=Amenokoyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane}}), descendant in the twelfth generation of Ōe no Omi,” indicating that the Nakatomi Aino clan enshrined their ancestral deity here. * {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 5 ({{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|qid=Q7753|1=1872}}): Designated as a {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. * Meiji 40 ({{ill|lt=1907|Q2048|qid=Q2048|1=1907}}), January: Designated as a shrine receiving offerings of sacred food and ritual implements. * April 5, Meiji 40: A heihaku shrine was merged into the shrine. * Meiji 41 ({{ill|lt=1908|Q2056|qid=Q2056|1=1908}}): The Shikinaisha '''{{ill|lt=Hekura Shrine|Q11481884|qid=Q11481884|1=Mitekura Shrine}}''' was merged. * Heisei 17 ({{ill|lt=2005|Q2019|qid=Q2019|1=2005}}): The main hall was newly constructed. As a commemorative event for its completion, a sacred ritual of {{ill|lt=kemari|Q12224003|qid=Q12224003|1=Kemari}}, closely associated with Fujiwara no Kamatari, was dedicated. Since then, the “Kemari Gathering” has been held annually every November.[https://dainenji.jimdofree.com/%E3%83%96%E3%83%AD%E3%82%B0-1/%E9%98%BF%E7%82%BA%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/%E9%98%BF%E7%82%BA%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE%E8%B9%B4%E9%9E%A0%E3%81%AE%E4%BC%9A/ Ai Shrine Kemari Gathering] – Jōdo sect {{ill|lt=Dainen-ji (Ibaraki City)|Q11435458|qid=Q11435458|lt=Dainen-ji|1=Dainen-ji Temple}} website. === Enshrined deities === Currently * {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q2564508|lt=Amenokoyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane}} * {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama-no-Kami|1=Ukanomitama}} * {{ill|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|Q382005|qid=Q382005|1=Sugawara no Michizane}} === Auxiliary shrines === * Wakamiya Hachimangū: {{ill|lt=Emperor Nintoku|Q313119|qid=Q313119|1=Emperor Nintoku}} * Akiba Shrine: {{ill|lt=Akiba Gongen|Q2680724|qid=Q2680724|lt=Akiba Daigongen|1=Akiba Gongen}} * Izumo Shrine: {{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|qid=Q272993|lt=Hayasusanō-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} * Kashima Shrine: {{ill|qid=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi|Q1502690|qid=Q1502690|qid=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi Ōkami|1=Takemikazuchi}} * Inari Shrine: Relocated from the Inari shrine of Mt. Abuyama * Ōtoshi Shrine: {{ill|lt=Toshigami|Q3028663|qid=Q3028663|lt=Ōtoshi Ōkami|1=Toshigami}} * Sugawara Shrine: {{ill|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|Q382005|qid=Q382005|1=Sugawara no Michizane}} * Ichikishimahime Shrine: {{ill|lt=Ichikishimahime|Q11059454|qid=Q11059454|qid=Q11059454|lt=Ichikishimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Ichikishima-hime}} * Inana Shrine: {{ill|qid=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama|Q3080728|qid=Q3080728|qid=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|1=Ukanomitama}} * Kanayama Shrine (Konpira Shrine): {{ill|lt=Kanayamahiko-no-Kami|Q4387856|qid=Q4387856|lt=Kanayamahiko-no-Mikoto|1=Kanayama-hiko and Kanayama-hime}} === References === * Ibaraki City Board of Education, *Our Town Ibaraki: Shrines and Temples Edition* (1989) {{National Bibliography Number|89049621}} * Bō Yukihiko Ten, “Historic Sites and Scenic Places of Mishima District” (1961) (included in Osaka Prefectural Board of Education, *Historic Sites, Scenic Places, and Natural Monuments of Osaka Prefecture*, Mishima District (1974), {{National Bibliography Number|73009804}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * {{Wayback|url=http://www3.ocn.ne.jp/~tohara/hokusetu-ai.html |title=Shikinaisha of Settsu / Ai Shrine |date=20110712231322}} (Tohara’s top page) {{Commons|Category:Ai-jinja}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ai Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ai Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kanpei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Settsu Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ibaraki, Osaka]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Settsu Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Osaka Prefecture]]
